text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
6 
CONDITION_CATEGORY_04 
LABEL: 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 04 (Cardiovascular Disorders) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for cardiovascular disorders (Condition Category 04). 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for this Condition Category
